## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs

## Validation
- [ ] `python -m compileall src dashboard`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`

## Fairness / Explainability impact
- [ ] No impact
- [ ] Fairness metrics changed
- [ ] Explainability outputs changed

## Checklist
- [ ] Linked issue (if applicable)
- [ ] Updated docs/README
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data added
